name: Diagnostic systeme complet
description: Collecte les informations systeme (CPU, RAM, stockage, batterie, reseau) dans un fichier.

steps.title: Collecte des informations systeme
steps.instruction: Un rapport complet sera genere avec les infos CPU, RAM, stockage, batterie et reseau.

actions.command: echo '=== WinRescue Diagnostic ===' > /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && echo "Date: $(date)" >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && echo "Modele: $(getprop ro.product.model)" >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && echo "Android: $(getprop ro.build.version.release)" >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && echo "Kernel: $(uname -r)" >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && echo '' >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && echo '=== CPU ===' >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && cat /proc/cpuinfo | head -20 >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && echo '' >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && echo '=== RAM ===' >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && cat /proc/meminfo | head -10 >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && echo '' >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && echo '=== Stockage ===' >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && df -h /data /sdcard 2>/dev/null >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && echo '' >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && echo '=== Batterie ===' >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && dumpsys battery >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && echo '' >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && echo '=== Reseau ===' >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && ip addr show 2>/dev/null | head -30 >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt && echo '=== Fin ===' >> /sdcard/winrescue_diag.txt
